introSection: Phoenix is a Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters wooden out and back roller coaster located at Knoebels Amusement Resort in Elysburg, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride opened in 1948 as the Rocket at Playland Park in San Antonio, Texas and later found its home in 1985 at Knoebels. At the time of its opening, Phoenix was the largest roller coaster ever moved from one park to another. Phoenix has received the Golden Ticket Award for best wooden roller coaster three times, in 2018, 2019, and 2021.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each row of seats has a buzzbar, a lap bar that has 1 fixed location, usually leaving a few inches between the rider's lap and the bar.

fullText:
Phoenix is a Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters wooden out and back roller coaster located at Knoebels Amusement Resort in Elysburg, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride opened in 1948 as the Rocket at Playland Park in San Antonio, Texas and later found its home in 1985 at Knoebels. At the time of its opening, Phoenix was the largest roller coaster ever moved from one park to another. Phoenix has received the Golden Ticket Award for best wooden roller coaster three times, in 2018, 2019, and 2021.



Each row of seats has a buzzbar, a lap bar that has 1 fixed location, usually leaving a few inches between the rider's lap and the bar.
